title: Crayon rule set (.crayon/rules.yaml)
description: Low-code materialization of `Rule` instances run by `crayon check`. Each entry selects a concrete rule `kind` (a built-in starter kind, or a custom subclass dropped in `.crayon/checks/`) and supplies its parameters. The CLI validates the parsed YAML against this schema; per-kind parameters beyond `kind`/`domain`/`severity` are validated by the rule class itself. Lives in the repo so rules are versioned and reviewable.

rules.description: Ordered list of executable rule instances.

rule.description: One executable rule: a concrete `kind` plus its parameters. Additional kind-specific keys are permitted and validated by the rule class.

kind.description: Registry key of the concrete `Rule` subclass (e.g. `outline_well_formed`, `word_count`, `section_drift`, or a custom kind from `.crayon/checks/`).

domain.description: Scope the rule acts on. Usually fixed by the kind; stated here only for clarity/override.

severity.description: Whether a failure fails `crayon check` (non-zero exit) or only warns.
